task_completion.description: Crawl the target URL using Screaming Frog SEO Spider
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is open with 'https://crawler-test.com/' entered in the URL bar and crawl progress or results displayed.

task_completion.description: Identify external links within the Screaming Frog interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'External' tab is selected in Screaming Frog, or a filter is applied showing outbound/external links found during the crawl.

task_completion.description: Export the external link results to a CSV file in the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal showing a CSV file being saved to or existing in '~/Documents/SEO/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Create the external links text report in the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a file named 'external_links_report.txt' located in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'.

task_completion.description: Include total count of external links and top external domains in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'external_links_report.txt' explicitly state the total number of external links found and list the top external domain(s).

task_completion.description: Include broken external links and an actionable recommendation in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'external_links_report.txt' mention any broken external links (or confirm none were found) and provide at least one actionable SEO recommendation based on the findings.

integrity.description: Agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Screaming Frog application being interacted with, rather than terminal commands (like curl/wget) or python scripts simulating a crawl.

integrity.description: CSV export was generated by the software, not manually fabricated
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file should appear to be generated via Screaming Frog's 'Export' button, rather than manually typed out in a text editor or generated by a separate script.

integrity.description: Report data matches the actual crawl results
integrity.visual_evidence: The domains and link counts in the text report should match what is visible in the Screaming Frog interface (e.g., mentioning 'søkbar.no' if only the homepage was crawled), rather than generic or hallucinated placeholder data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is verified as https://crawler-test.com/. Note: The main page of this URL only contains 1 external link to 1 external domain (http://www.søkbar.no). The agent's report may reflect this single link if it only crawled the homepage, or more if it configured the spider to crawl the entire site. Both are acceptable as long as the report reflects the genuine crawl results.
